zh.lifeSummary: 當Samuel Guild於1677年10月12日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼迪德哈姆時，他的父親Samuel Guild29歲，母親Mary Woodcock23歲。他於1700年1月8日與Sarah Hartshorn在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1750年5月29日在美國康乃狄克州文達哈姆文達哈姆享年72歲，埋葬在美國康乃狄克州托藍德哥倫比亞笛卡爾 亞德 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Samuel Guild于1677年10月12日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼迪德哈姆时，他的父亲Samuel Guild29岁，母亲Mary Woodcock23岁。他于1700年1月8日与Sarah Hartshorn在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1750年5月29日在美国康涅狄格州文達哈姆文達哈姆享年72岁，埋葬在美国康涅狄格州托藍德哥倫比亞笛卡爾 亞德 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Guild
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Angus and Perthshire): apparently a nickname for someone who played a prominent part in a medieval guild. It may, however, be a Scottish variant of   Gould  .

nameMeanings.name: Samuel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (Hebrew Shemuel), possibly meaning ‘He (God) has hearkened’ (presumably to the prayers of a mother for a son). It may also be understood as a contracted form of Hebrew sha'ulme'el meaning ‘asked of God’. In the case of Samuel the son of Hannah, this would be more in keeping with his mother's statement ‘Because I have asked him of the Lord’ (1 Samuel 1:20). Living in the 11th century bc , Samuel was a Hebrew judge and prophet of the greatest historical importance, who established the Hebrew monarchy, anointing as king both Saul and, later, David. In the Authorized Version two books of the Old Testament are named after him, although in Roman Catholic and Orthodox versions of the Bible they are known as the first and second Book of Kings. The story of Samuel being called by God while still a child serving in the house of Eli the priest (1 Samuel 3) is of great vividness and has moved countless generations. In England and America the name was particularly popular among the 16th-century Puritans and among Nonconformists from the 17th to the 19th century. It became fashionable again in the 1990s.

en.lifeSummary: When Samuel Guild was born on 12 October 1677, in Dedham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Samuel Guild, was 29 and his mother, Mary Woodcock, was 23. He married Sarah Hartshorn on 8 January 1700, in Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 29 May 1750, in Windham, Windham, Connecticut, United States, at the age of 72, and was buried in Old Yard Cemetery, Columbia, Tolland, Connecticut, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Samuel Guild est né le 12 octobre 1677, à Dedham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Samuel Guild, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Mary Woodcock, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Sarah Hartshorn le 8 janvier 1700, à Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 29 mai 1750, à Windham, Windham, Connecticut, États-Unis, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Old Yard Cemetery, Columbia, Tolland, Connecticut, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Samuel Guild am 12. Oktober 1677 in Dedham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater Samuel Guild 29 und seine Mutter Mary Woodcock 23. Er hat am 8. Januar 1700 in Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Sarah Hartshorn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 29. Mai 1750 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Windham, Windham, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Old Yard Cemetery, Columbia, Tolland, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Samuel Guild è nato il il 12 ottobre 1677 nel Dedham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Samuel Guild, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Mary Woodcock, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Sarah Hartshorn il 8 gennaio 1700, nel Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 29 maggio 1750, nel Windham, Windham, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Old Yard Cemetery, Columbia, Tolland, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Samuel Guildが1677年10月12日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーデドハムで生まれた時，父Samuel Guildは29歳，母Mary Woodcockは23歳であった。1700年1月8日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーノーフォルクでSarah Hartshornと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1750年5月29日にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ウィンドハムウィンドハムで72歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州トランドコルンビアオルド ヤード セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Samuel Guild(이)가 1677년 10월 12일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 데드함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Samuel Guild(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Woodcock(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1700년 1월 8일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 노르폴크에서 Sarah Hartshorn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1750년 5월 29일 미국 코네티컷 주 윈드함 윈드함에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 코네티컷 주 톨랜드 콜럼비아 드 야어드 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Samuel Guild nasceu em 12 de outubro de 1677, em Dedham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Samuel Guild, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Mary Woodcock, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Sarah Hartshorn em 8 de janeiro de 1700, em Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 29 de maio de 1750, em Windham, Windham, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Old Yard Cemetery, Columbia, Tolland, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Samuel Guild родился 12 октября 1677 г. в местности дедхам, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Samuel Guild было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Woodcock, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Hartshorn 8 января 1700 г. в местности норфолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 29 мая 1750 г. в местности виндхам, виндхам, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности олд ярд кеметири, колумбя, толланд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Samuel Guild nació el 12 de octubre de 1677, en Dedham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Samuel Guild, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Mary Woodcock, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Sarah Hartshorn el 8 de enero de 1700, en Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 29 de mayo de 1750, en Windham, Windham, Connecticut, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Old Yard Cemetery, Columbia, Tolland, Connecticut, Estados Unidos.
